title: Smoky Chewy Argentinian Lentils Stew
description: A hearty, lowfat stew bursting with smoky flavor from dried red chilies-perfect for a quick hangover cure.

ingredients.name: dried red chilies
ingredients.notes: rehydrate in hot water for 10 minutes, remove stems

instructions: Soak the dried red chilies in hot water for 10 minutes, then drain and set aside.
Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add the diced onion, garlic, carrot, and celery; sauté until the vegetables are softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the red lentils, tomato puree, smoked paprika, cumin, bay leaf, salt, and pepper. Stir well to combine and let the spices toast for 1-2 minutes.
Pour in the vegetable broth and bring the mixture to a boil. Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 25-30 minutes, or until the lentils are tender yet still chewy.
Add the rehydrated chilies to the pot and continue simmering for another 5-8 minutes, allowing the chilies to soften and infuse the stew.
Taste and adjust seasoning if necessary. Stir in lemon juice and remove the bay leaf.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley. Enjoy the smoky, comforting flavors that help ease a hangover and satisfy any appetite.
